description.old: New carport rear of main house alley access
description.new:
New carport rear of main house alley access

The original permit documents included a full demolition of the existing garage and construction of a new carport.
Applicant to use this BP to remodel Garage instead of constructing a new carport.
Revision
This plan revision changes the scope to a remodel of the existing garage. The permit for the full garage demolition should be voided and the permit for the carport should be amended with the scope on the attached drawings.

A full set of drawings is submitted. The revised scope for the garage remodel is shown on the following sheets: A0.95 A1.01 A1.71 A1.81 A2.01a A4.03 A4.04
